differential_diagnoses: Postictal psychosis associated with refractory temporal lobe epilepsy
next_steps: Perform lumbar puncture for CSF analysis, including paraneoplastic and autoimmune encephalitis panels
Obtain serum voltage-gated potassium channel (VGKC) complex, LGI1, and CASPR2 antibodies
Continue continuous video-EEG monitoring to definitively rule out nonconvulsive status epilepticus
Review medication serum levels (carbamazepine, topiramate) and perform comprehensive metabolic panel
Obtain collateral history from family regarding the timeline of behavioral and cognitive changes
Optimize antiseizure therapy while minimizing polypharmacy to reduce potential neurotoxic delirium
